---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the limitation or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that would help.
